examples: Objective; To observe the intima ultrastructure of middle cerebral artery in hypertensive rats.
The area of plaques and intima media thickness in CHD group were thinner after treatment of pravastatin.
The carotid intima-media thickness (IMT) refers to the vertical dimension between carotid intima and media.
In Kent's aorta model most of the tears are transverse, or across the artery, in a section called the isthmus, and they start on the intima, or the inner layer of the aorta.
